source_title: FTC Takes Action Against TruHeight for Deceptive, Unsubstantiated Advertising for Supposed Height-Enhancing Supplements for Kids and Teens
label_basis: Public FTC enforcement summary; row paraphrases the claim pattern for deterministic policy testing.
label_rationale: Child growth supplement promotion uses clinical, doctor, supplement, and absolute outcome language.

input.headline: Clinically proven growth supplement for kids
input.body: Doctor recommended daily supplement helps teens grow taller. Works for everyone with no side effects when taken every day.
input.landing_page_html:
Clinically proven growth supplement

Doctor recommended supplement information for families. Results vary and medical review may be needed.

source_title: FTC Takes Action Against Telemedicine Firm NextMed Over Charges It Used Misleading Prices, Fake Reviews, and Deceptive Weight Loss Claims to Sell GLP-1 Weight-Loss Programs
label_basis: Public FTC enforcement summary; row paraphrases weight-loss and offer-term risk patterns.
label_rationale: Telehealth weight-loss program combines quantified weight-loss, prescription/clinic signals, free-trial language, and urgency.

input.headline: Lose 50 pounds with GLP-1 telehealth
input.body: Weight loss program members lose 50 pounds with prescription support. Start a free trial before the offer expires today and book a clinic appointment online.
input.landing_page_html:
Prescription telehealth weight loss

Lose weight with clinical support. Free trial and membership terms apply. Book a clinic appointment.

source_title: FTC to Ban BetterHelp from Revealing Consumers' Data, Including Sensitive Mental Health Information, to Facebook and Others
label_basis: Public FTC enforcement summary; row paraphrases mental-health questionnaire retargeting risk.
label_rationale: Mental-health questionnaire and symptoms fields are paired with Meta and TikTok tracking. Disclosure labels are intentionally excluded because the source issue is privacy sharing, not creator sponsorship.

Therapy support

source_title: Proposed FTC Order Will Prohibit Telehealth Firm Cerebral from Using or Disclosing Sensitive Data for Most Advertising Purposes

source_title: Justice Department Secures Groundbreaking Settlement Agreement with Meta Platforms
label_basis: Public DOJ settlement announcement and HUD charging context; row paraphrases discriminatory housing-ad targeting risk.
label_rationale: Housing campaign targeting excludes protected or sensitive groups. Label is medium confidence because current AdLint platform rules only approximate housing discrimination risk through LinkedIn/general policy signals.

input.headline: Luxury apartments for young professionals only
input.body: Promote apartment listings to young professionals only while excluding users by religion and ethnicity. Housing social issue targeting needs review.
